title: School Year
description: This policy governs the structure and length of the school year for the district. It establishes the framework for how the academic calendar is organized, including the number of days or hours students are required to attend school.
description_local: This policy covers how the school district sets its annual academic calendar, including the start and end dates of the school year, holidays, and other important scheduling decisions. It affects all students, families, and staff across the district. Parents and community members should be aware of this policy because the school calendar directly impacts family planning, childcare arrangements, and community activities throughout the year.
